# Expose machine-readable release blockers and next actions in public status

Epic: `PUBLIC-022` — Public product, citation and dashboard maturity

Labels: type:dashboard, type:release, phase:release-gate, status:ready

Status: `ready`

## Background

This issue was generated from `conductor/backlog.yml`. Refine the acceptance criteria
before opening it in GitHub.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Scope is confirmed.
- [ ] Licence and data-governance implications are checked.
- [ ] Tests or validation evidence are defined.
- [ ] Documentation or Conductor context is updated.
